Source: OpenAI Python SDK Releases
URL: https://github.com/openai/openai-python/releases
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# OpenAI Python SDK Releases

## v2.29.0 (March 17, 2026)
- Added support for 5.4 nano and mini model slugs
- Integrated /v1/videos endpoint into batches create method
- Introduced defer_loading field to ToolFunction
- Added in and nin operators to ComparisonFilter type
- Fixed typing-extensions minimum version dependency
- Adjusted pydantic's by_alias parameter handling

## v2.28.0 (March 13, 2026)
- Implemented custom voices functionality

## v2.27.0 (March 13, 2026)
- Sora API enhancements: character API, video extensions/edits, higher resolution exports
- Repaired merged videos resource
- Updated WebSockets protocol naming conventions

## v2.26.0 (March 5, 2026)
- ComputerTool moved to general availability; computer_use_preview transitioned to ComputerUsePreview class

## v2.25.0 (March 5, 2026)
- Launched gpt-5.4 model with tool search capability and new computer tool
- Removed prompt_cache_key parameter from responses
- Internal schema corrections and phase field adjustments

## v2.24.0 (February 24, 2026)
- Added phase field support
- Improved SSE event parsing refactoring

## v2.23.0 (February 24, 2026)
- Added gpt-realtime-1.5 and gpt-audio-1.5 model options

## v2.22.0 (February 23, 2026)
- Implemented WebSockets support for responses API
- Enhanced documentation for file batches, audio, chat, realtime, and video methods

## v2.21.0 (February 13, 2026)
- Container network policy and skills support
- Memory leak resolution in structured outputs
- Webhook compatibility improvements

## v2.20.0 (February 10, 2026)
- Support for images in batch API
